problem id: d6e6f8b5
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(5) XOR SHR(7)

examples:
  00101111 -> 11100000
  10001011 -> 01100001
  00101101 -> 10100000
  00010010 -> 01000000
  00010100 -> 10000000
  10100001 -> 00100001
  11101100 -> 10000001
  10100111 -> 11100001
  10001001 -> 00100001
  00100101 -> 10100000

query: 11100111
predicted answer: 11100001
